scripts.test:e2e: pnpm build:test && concurrently --kill-others --success first --names services,tests "pnpm start:all" "wait-on http://127.0.0.1:3000 http://127.0.0.1:8100/__control && APP_PORT=3000 playwright test --retries 1 && node e2e/assert-redactions.mjs"
scripts.test:e2e:ci: pnpm build:test && concurrently --kill-others --success first --names services,tests "pnpm start:all" "wait-on http://127.0.0.1:3000 http://127.0.0.1:8100/__control --timeout 120000 && APP_PORT=3000 RECORD_MODE=1 playwright test --workers 1 && node e2e/assert-redactions.mjs && APP_PORT=3000 playwright test --retries 1"
